name: Wine Butter Sauce - Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Peppercorns, white, whole (including Bay leaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sauté pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the shallot puree and sauté for 1 minute more.
3. Add the crushed bay leaf and peppercorns.
4. Deglaze the pan with 1 cup white wine. Reduce by two-thirds over medium heat (not until dry).
5. Add the whipping cream, then add the butter a quarter at a time, whisking briskly over high heat.
6. Strain through a chinois and reserve.
